methodology: alpha_seed = sum(accepted column) / n_rows in c1_attr_seed{N}.csv; median computed across seeds. Source run: PR #529 (scripts/c29_kiln_logits_dump.sh), KILN_SPEC_METHOD=mtp KILN_BENCH_FORCE_MTP=1 KILN_W4A16=1, greedy (temperature=0), --paged, seeds=[0,1,2] indexing PROMPT_POOL[seed%30] (= GSM8K prose prompts 0,1,2), --prompt-tokens 512, --max-output-tokens 16, no chat template, splice dumps captured at POSITIONS=0..3 × MAX_STEPS=2. NOTE: the task brief's 7/22 ≈ 0.318 hint refers to the subset of {accept-labeled, reject-labeled} splice rows used by the H15b C29 v2 top-K probe. This script uses all 11/12/11 rows per seed from the full c1_attr CSV (every speculative_mtp_decode_step call, not only dumped rows).
